title: Natural Health 4 Life Carol Anne Milk Chocolate Honeycomb 425g (1 Jar) – Recyclable Gift Jar, 5.0g Protein per 100g, Vegetarian Snack for Gifting, Sharing & Baking, Made in UK
features: Creamy Milk Chocolate Coating: Made with 23% crisp honeycomb and 77% rich milk chocolate containing 20% cocoa solids, each bite offers a rich, balanced flavor that satisfies sweet cravings with a delicious crunch.
Perfect Snack Option: Enjoy chocolate covered Honeycomb as a convenient and delicious snack for any occasion, whether you're at home, at work, traveling, or on the go.

Naturally Nutritious: Our honeycomb chocolate are naturally nutritious, offering 5.0g of protein and 0.5g of fiber per 100g, with no preservatives and a vegetarian-friendly recipe, making them a tasty, healthy snack anytime.
Thoughtful Gift Idea : Our milk chocolate Honeycomb come in an attractive recyclable PET jar with a unique angled base and airtight seal, ideal as gifts for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions.
Versatile Treat: Enjoy chocolate coated honeycomb straight from the jar, add it to dessert trays, or mix it into baking recipes for a luxurious, chocolatey twist.
description: Product description Enjoy the sweet crunch of Natural Health 4 Life Milk Chocolate Honeycomb – a classic treat made with crispy honeycomb and rich milk chocolate. Each piece is light and crunchy on the inside and coated with smooth, creamy chocolate on the outside. This 425g gift jar is perfect for snacking, sharing, or giving as a thoughtful present. The clear PET jar has a unique angled base that gives it a vintage sweet-shop look. It’s also induction sealed to keep everything fresh inside. Made in the UK, this honeycomb chocolate is vegetarian-friendly, free from preservatives, and loved by snackers of all ages. ✅ Nutrition (Per 100g) Energy: 2040 kJ / 487 kcal Fat: 24.0g (Saturated: 14.4g) Carbohydrates: 62.5g (Sugars: 62.0g) Fibre: 1.1g Protein: 5.0g Salt: 0.2g ✅ Ingredients Milk chocolate (77%): sugar, cocoa butter, skim milk powder, cocoa mass, whey (milk), palm oil, full cream milk powder, butter oil (milk), emulsifier (rapeseed lecithin), glazing agents (gum arabic, shellac). Honeycomb (23%): sugar, glucose, raising agent (sodium bicarbonate), rice flour. May contain nuts and/or peanuts. Milk chocolate contains vegetable fat in addition to cocoa butter. Minimum 20% cocoa solids and 20% milk solids. Ingredients Milk Chocolate (77%), (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Skim Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass, Whey (Milk), Vegetable Fat (Palm Oil), Full Cream Milk Powder, Butter Oil (Milk), Emulsifier: Rapeseed Lecithin E322, Glazing Agents: Gum Arabic E414, Shellac E904. Honeycomb (23%) Sugar, Glucose, Raising Agent: Sodium Bicarbonate E500, Rice Flour. Milk Chocolate contains Vegetable Fat in addition to Cocoa Butter. Cocoa Solids 20% min. Milk Solids 20% min. May contain Nuts and/or Peanuts.
